    In association with

    In association with

    • ABOUT US

    What We Do

    We allow people, institutions, and states to acquire gold at the lowest cost possible. In addition, we provide the world with a gold-backed cryptocurrency/utility token that is suitable for day to day transactions while also acting as a means of portfolio diversification against volatility.

    • ABOUT US

    What We Do

    We allow people, institutions, and states to acquire gold at the lowest cost possible. In addition, we provide the world with a gold-backed cryptocurrency/utility token that is suitable for day to day transactions while also acting as a means of portfolio diversification against volatility.

    • CHECK THE BENEFITS

    Why IPMB?

    We are the best solution in the market for retail and institutional users when it comes to:

    The only truly vertically integrated operation in the world!
    The IPMB Ecosystem runs from the mine to the vault, to the cloud. We have the full gold vertical which means we play an active role in the production, smelting, refining, and storage of LBMA standard gold. This allows us to obtain gold at a discounted rate whereas competitors may purchase gold at a premium. This allows us to waive traditional management and other fees. This will allow for a lower gold acquisition cost and the possibility of loyalty rewards for our token holders.
    Read more
    Global Digital Payments

    GoldPro Token is situated to be an ideal currency for transactions due to its gold backing. This allows it to be a safe token/payment currency used for day to day transactions and exchange, applicable to a wide range of goods and services.

    Read more
    Portfolio diversification against volatility

    IPMB provides a means of portfolio diversification against volatility; with additional benefits through exposure to precious metals such as gold. Each GoldPro Token is backed by at least 1 gram of gold Dore. Thus, each token is floored by the price of gold. It is backed, not pegged! As the adoption of the token grows, so does its value. GoldPro Token, unlike GEM, has other value considerations than gold. GEM is a stable token, GEM1 is equal in value to 1 gram of gold. Staking GoldPro Token unlocks a discount on GEM, which means a discount of up to 11% on redeemable physical gold.

    Read more
    The Lowest Cost Gold Acquisition Platform in the World!

    The GEM Token is a promissory note of quantified allocations of investment-grade 24-carat gold. Each NFT is backed and pegged 1:1 to LBMA-certified gold. When you purchase a GEM, you own the highest quality gold in the world at the lowest cost available in the market! GEM reduces gold acquisition because it allows us to waive modern-day gold ownership costs and fees due to our full vertical token operation. In addition, you get a discount of 11% on the physical gold purchase through staking your GoldPro Tokens, while benefiting from annual loyalty rewards every 12 months in the form of physical gold added to your holdings.

    Read more
    Provenance and Authenticity of the Gold Traceable and Verifiable for Buyers
    Goldtrace360 is our proprietary product, built through the amalgamation and integration of blockchain technology, smart contracts, IoT devices and sensors throughout the gold supply chain, from the mine to the vault and in the cloud. The product enables stakeholders to verify critical information about the gold, such as its provenance, responsible sourcing practices, certifications, and supply chain data.
    Read more
    For the First Time – IPMB is Making Gold a Positive-Carry Asset
    Gold has historically been a negative carry asset, which means holding the asset is costly over short periods of time. Now, by utilizing the IPMB Ecosystem, gain access to no-fee gold and even the opportunity of an 11% discount with rewards in physical gold to our loyal community of holders.
    Read more

    • CHECK THE BENEFITS

    Why IPMB?

    We are the best solution in the market for retail and institutional users when it comes to:

    • The only truly vertically integrated operation in the world!

      The IPMB Ecosystem runs from the mine to the vault, to the cloud. We have the full gold vertical which means we play an active role in the production, smelting, refining, and storage of LBMA standard gold. This allows us to obtain gold at a discounted rate whereas competitors may purchase gold at a premium. This allows us to waive traditional management and other fees. This will allow for a lower gold acquisition cost and the possibility of loyalty rewards for our token holders.
      Read more

    • Global Digital Payments

      The GoldPro Token is situated to be an ideal currency for transactions due to its gold backing. This allows it to be a safe token/payment currency used for day to day transactions and exchange, applicable to a wide range of goods and services.

      Read more

    • Portfolio diversification against volatility

      IPMB provides a means of portfolio diversification against volatility; with additional benefits through exposure to precious metals such as gold. Each GoldPro Token is backed by at least 1 gram of gold Dore. Thus, each token is floored by the price of gold. It is backed, not pegged! As the adoption of the token grows, so does its value. The GoldPro Token, unlike GEM, has other value considerations than gold. GEM is a stable token, GEM1 is equal in value to 1 gram of gold. Staking GoldPro Tokens unlocks a discount on GEM, which means a discount of up to 11% on redeemable physical gold.

      Read more

    • The Lowest Cost Gold Acquisition Platform in the World!

      The GEM Token is a promissory note of quantified allocations of investment-grade 24-carat gold. Each NFT is backed and pegged 1:1 to LBMA-certified gold. When you purchase a GEM, you own the highest quality gold in the world at the lowest cost available in the market! GEM reduces gold acquisition because it allows us to waive modern-day gold ownership costs and fees due to our full vertical token operation. In addition, you get a discount of 11% on the physical gold purchase through staking your GPRO, while benefiting from annual loyalty rewards every 12 months in the form of physical gold added to your holdings.

      Read more

    • Provenance and Authenticity of the Gold Traceable and Verifiable for Buyers

      Goldtrace360 is our proprietary product, built through the amalgamation and integration of blockchain technology, smart contracts, IoT devices and sensors throughout the gold supply chain, from the mine to the vault and in the cloud. The product enables stakeholders to verify critical information about the gold, such as its provenance, responsible sourcing practices, certifications, and supply chain data.
      Read more

    • For the First Time – IPMB is Making Gold a Positive-Carry Asset

      Gold has historically been a negative carry asset, which means holding the asset is costly over short periods of time. Now, by utilizing the IPMB Ecosystem, gain access to no-fee gold and even the opportunity of an 11% discount with rewards in physical gold to our loyal community of holders.
      Read more

        AS SEEN ON:

          • CHECK OUR WORKING MODEL

          The Dual-Token Model

          The dual-token model within the IPMB Ecosystem is designed to offer services to a diverse range of parties such as individuals, institutions and even government bodies.

          GoldPro Token: Our hybrid utility/payment token

          A key component of our ecosystem is the GoldPro Token, our hybrid payment/utility token. 

          Each GoldPro Token is backed by a gram of gold in the ecosystem supply chain.
          The value of a GoldPro Token is not pegged to the price of gold.
          The GoldPro Token price floats due to many value considerations.

          Read More

          GEM: Digital Gold

          Globally exchanged Metal, (GEM) NFTs, are unique tokens representing quantified and specific allocations of physical gold. GEM NFTs allow direct access and exposure to tokenized gold without any fees associated with modern-day gold ownership such as storage, insurance and management.

          Read More

          Total Ecosystem Gold Reserves ≥ GoldPro Tokens in Circulation + GEM NFT Tokens Minted

          Road Map

          • Q2 2023

            • Initiation of the business idea to digitise the physical business

            • Brainstorming, networking and conducting market research

          • Q3 2023

            • Execution of the business plan
            • Whitepaper preparation
            • Development and testing of ERC20 Smart Contracts

          • Q4 2023

            • ERC20 Smart contract Audit
            • Obtained an EU VASP license from the Czech Republic
            • Listing on Exchanges

          • Q1 2024

            • Verified Proof of Reserves engagement
            • Listing on further exchanges
            • Obtain FINMA License (Switzerland)
            • Launch of IPMB Web3 wallet
            • Partnerships with premium brand merchants

          • Q2 2024

            • Listing on further exchanges
            • Partnerships with premium brand merchants

          • Q3 2024

            • Expansion of partnerships with premium brand merchants
            • Development, testing and audit of GEM NFT and Staking smart contracts
            • Preparation of 3 smelters, a refinery and a vault to be operated and managed in-house for the IPMB Ecosystem (these sites have already been agreed upon)

          • Q4 2024

            • Creation of a crypto payment gateway platform (offramp) for vendors providing goods and services with IPMB
            • Deployment of IPMB Staking Contracts
            •  Evolution of IPMB Token to GoldPro Token (GPRO)

          • Q1 2025

            • Launch of GEM NFTs
            • Layer 2 Solutions: Implement Layer 2 scaling solutions to enhance transaction speed and reduce costs, ensuring seamless and efficient operations on the blockchain
            • Interoperability: Develop interoperability protocols to allow GoldPro Tokens and GEM NFTs to interact with other blockchains, increasing their utility and accessibility across different ecosystems
            • AI-Powered Smart Contracts: Integrate AI to create adaptive smart contracts that can automatically adjust terms based on market conditions, enhancing the functionality and flexibility of transactions

          • Q1 2025

            • Smart Oracles: Use decentralized oracles to provide real-time data feeds for smart contracts, ensuring accurate and up-to-date information for automated processes
            • Smart Sensors: Deploy IoT sensors with AI capabilities to monitor gold’s physical attributes and environmental conditions, ensuring the highest standards of quality and authenticity
            • Predictive Analytics: Utilise AI-driven predictive analytics to forecast market trends and optimise supply chain management
            • Obtain licenses to operate through partnerships with regulated financial institutions in the UK (FCA) and UAE (VARA)

          • Q2 2025

            • Establishing banking licences and operations in Switzerland
            • Credit card processing and IPMB debit cards
            • Token Swap Features: Develop a decentralized exchange (DEX) where users can swap GoldPro Tokens with other tokenized assets, increasing liquidity and utility
            • Collateralization Options: Enable GoldPro Tokens to be used as collateral for various DeFi applications, including lending and borrowing platforms
            • Development and testing of Goldtrace360

          • Q3 2025

            • Fractional Gold Ownership: Micro-GEM NFTs: Develop fractional GEM NFTs representing smaller amounts of gold, making gold investment accessible to a wider audience
            • Gold-Backed Stablecoins: Stablecoin Development: Introduce a stablecoin fully backed by physical gold, offering a stable digital asset that appeals to risk-averse investors
            • NFT Marketplace: GEM NFT Marketplace: Launch a dedicated marketplace for buying, selling, and trading GEM NFTs, providing a centralized platform for gold-backed digital assets
            • Goldtrace360 beta

          • Q4 2025

            • Apply for a Money Transmitter Licence for IPMB or a no-action letter confirming that a licence is not required in the U.S.
            • Register as a Money Services Business with the U.S. Department of Treasury’s Financial Crimes Enforcement Network (FinCEN)
            • Goldtrace360 launch

          • Q1 2026

            • API Development: Develop robust APIs to integrate GEM NFTs into banking platforms, allowing banks to offer gold-backed digital assets to their customers
            • Collaborative Products: Work with financial institutions to develop joint products, such as gold-backed savings accounts and investment products

          • Q2 2026

            • Strategic Alliances: Global Partnerships: Establish strategic alliances with leading banks and financial institutions worldwide to expand the reach and adoption of IPMB products

            Social

            Token Information

            Developers

            © Copyright 2024 IPMB

            Company Information:
            IPMB BULLION s.r.o, is a Czech-licensed Virtual Asset Service Provider (VASP), specializing in the tokenization of gold and offering a gold-backed cryptocurrency and related services.

            License and Registration:
            IPMB BULLION s.r.o, is registered in the Czech Republic under company registration number [19796901]. Our principal office is located at Chudenická 1059/30, 102 00, Praha 10 - Hostivař.

            Regulatory Compliance:
            IPMB BULLION s.r.o, adheres to all relevant financial regulations, including Anti-Money Laundering (AML) and Countering the Financing of Terrorism (CFT) requirements. We enforce a strict Know Your Customer (KYC) policy in line with the EU’s 5th Anti-Money Laundering Directive and other international standards.

            Risk Disclosure:
            Cryptocurrency transactions involve inherent risks due to the volatile nature of virtual assets. The value of GoldPro Tokens may fluctuate, and there is no guarantee of future performance. Participants should conduct their own research and assess their risk tolerance before engaging in cryptocurrency transactions.

            Privacy and Data Protection:
            We are committed to protecting your personal information. For details on how we collect, use, and safeguard your data, please refer to our Privacy Policy https://www.ipmb.com/privacy-policy/.

            Contact Us:
            For inquiries or support, please reach out to us at info@ipmb.com

            License and Registration:
            IPMB BULLION s.r.o, is registered in the Czech Republic under company registration number [19796901]. Our principal office is located at Chudenická 1059/30, 102 00, Praha 10 - Hostivař.

            Regulatory Compliance:
            IPMB BULLION s.r.o, adheres to all relevant financial regulations, including Anti-Money Laundering (AML) and Countering the Financing of Terrorism (CFT) requirements. We enforce a strict Know Your Customer (KYC) policy in line with the EU’s 5th Anti-Money Laundering Directive and other international standards.

            Risk Disclosure:
            Cryptocurrency transactions involve inherent risks due to the volatile nature of virtual assets. The value of GoldPro Tokens may fluctuate, and there is no guarantee of future performance. Participants should conduct their own research and assess their risk tolerance before engaging in cryptocurrency transactions.

            Privacy and Data Protection:
            We are committed to protecting your personal information. For details on how we collect, use, and safeguard your data, please refer to our Privacy Policy https://www.ipmb.com/privacy-policy/.
